icp:
Dating apps, social discovery apps, matchmaking platforms, companion apps,
apps for meeting new people. Like Tinder, Badoo, Bumble, Hinge, Grindr, OkCupid, MeetMe,
Zoosk, Happn, Coffee Meets Bagel, and similar. Also broader: any mobile app for shared
time spending, social meetups, companion finding. Gay dating, any dating niche.
Must be mobile apps with paid features or in-app purchases (top grossing, top paid).
NOT informational websites, NOT news sites, NOT blogs, NOT recruitment platforms.

filters.semantic_description: Dating apps and social discovery platforms for meeting new people. Mobile apps like Tinder Badoo Bumble Hinge Grindr OkCupid for dating matchmaking relationships social meetups companion finding
